read-pdf-creator-metadata.title: Read PDF Creator Metadata using PdfFileInfo
read-pdf-creator-metadata.description: Shows how to open a PDF with Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfFileInfo and retrieve the Creator metadata property.

read-update-pdf-metadata.title: Read and Update PDF Metadata with PdfFileInfo
read-update-pdf-metadata.description: Demonstrates how to bind a PDF file, read its metadata such as title, author, page count and version, modify the metadata, and save the changes to a new PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

read-pdf-modification-date.title: Read PDF Modification Date with PdfFileInfo
read-pdf-modification-date.description: Shows how to use Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfFileInfo to verify a PDF, extract its ModDate string, convert the PDF date format to a .NET DateTime, and display the modification date in a readable format.

read-pdf-title-metadata-to-log.title: Read PDF Title Metadata and Write to Log
read-pdf-title-metadata-to-log.description: Demonstrates how to use the PdfFileInfo facade to read the Title metadata from a PDF document and write it to a log file.

read-pdf-author-metadata.title: Read PDF Author Metadata
read-pdf-author-metadata.description: Shows how to retrieve the Author metadata from a PDF file using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfFileInfo and display it on the console.

add-projectcode-metadata-to-pdf.title: Add Custom ProjectCode Metadata to PDF
add-projectcode-metadata-to-pdf.description: Shows how to load a PDF, add a custom metadata entry named "ProjectCode" using SetMetaInfo, and save the updated file.

retrieve-pdf-keywords-metadata.title: Retrieve PDF Keywords Metadata with PdfFileInfo
retrieve-pdf-keywords-metadata.description: Demonstrates how to open a PDF file using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfFileInfo, verify it is a PDF, and read the Keywords metadata property.

update-pdf-author-metadata.title: Update PDF Author Metadata with PdfFileInfo
update-pdf-author-metadata.description: Demonstrates how to modify the Author property of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfFileInfo and persist the change to a new file with SaveNewInfo.

retrieve-custom-pdf-metadata-projectcode.title: Retrieve Custom PDF Metadata (ProjectCode)
retrieve-custom-pdf-metadata-projectcode.description: Demonstrates how to use Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfFileInfo to read a custom metadata entry named "ProjectCode" from a PDF file and display it.

clear-custom-pdf-metadata-field.title: Clear Custom PDF Metadata Field
clear-custom-pdf-metadata-field.description: Demonstrates how to remove a specific custom metadata entry from a PDF by setting its value to an empty string using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

set-pdf-creator-metadata.title: Set PDF Creator Metadata Using PdfFileInfo
set-pdf-creator-metadata.description: Demonstrates how to assign a custom Creator value to a PDF file using Aspose.Pdf's PdfFileInfo facade and persist the change to a new file.

add-custom-metadata-to-pdf.title: Add Custom Metadata Field to PDF
add-custom-metadata-to-pdf.description: Shows how to set a custom metadata entry (ReviewedBy) on an existing PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfFileInfo and save the modified file.

set-pdf-keywords-metadata.title: Set PDF Keywords Metadata with PdfFileInfo
set-pdf-keywords-metadata.description: Demonstrates how to assign keyword metadata to a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfFileInfo, save the updated document, and verify the change.

update-pdf-title-metadata.title: Update PDF Title Metadata using PdfFileInfo
update-pdf-title-metadata.description: Demonstrates how to modify the Title property of a PDF file with the PdfFileInfo facade and save the changes to a new document.

read-custom-pdf-metadata-safely.title: Read Custom PDF Metadata Safely
read-custom-pdf-metadata-safely.description: Demonstrates using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfFileInfo to check for a custom metadata key "Confidential" and retrieve its value only when the key exists.

retrieve-reviewedby-metadata.title: Retrieve Custom PDF Metadata (ReviewedBy) Using PdfFileInfo
retrieve-reviewedby-metadata.description: Demonstrates how to read a custom metadata field named "ReviewedBy" from a PDF file using Aspose.Pdf's PdfFileInfo facade and log the value for audit purposes.

update-pdf-metadata-save-new-info.title: Update PDF Metadata and Save to New File
update-pdf-metadata-save-new-info.description: Demonstrates how to modify PDF metadata using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfFileInfo and persist the changes to a new PDF file with SaveNewInfo.

add-or-update-custom-pdf-metadata.title: Add or Update Custom PDF Metadata While Preserving Existing Entries
add-or-update-custom-pdf-metadata.description: Demonstrates how to use Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfFileInfo to add or update a custom metadata field (Version) without losing any existing metadata, and save the changes to a new PDF file.

handle-readonly-file-errors-saving-pdf-m.title: Handle Read‑Only File Errors When Saving PDF Metadata
handle-readonly-file-errors-saving-pdf-m.description: Demonstrates updating PDF metadata with Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfFileInfo and handling IOException caused by a read‑only target file by clearing the attribute and retrying the save operation.

audit-pdf-metadata-to-csv.title: Audit and Update PDF Metadata with CSV Log
audit-pdf-metadata-to-csv.description: Demonstrates how to read, modify, and save PDF metadata using Aspose.Pdf.Facades, then record the original and new values to a CSV file for auditing.

update-pdf-keywords-metadata.title: Update PDF Keywords Metadata Using PdfFileInfo
update-pdf-keywords-metadata.description: Demonstrates how to open a PDF from a stream with PdfFileInfo, modify the Keywords metadata, and save the updated document to a new file.

read-pdf-version-using-aspose-pdf-facade.title: Read PDF Version Using Aspose.Pdf Facade
read-pdf-version-using-aspose-pdf-facade.description: Demonstrates how to obtain the PDF version string from a PDF file using the Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfFileInfo class. The version is stored in a variable for later use.

backup-pdfs-update-metadata.title: Backup PDFs and Update Metadata with PdfFileInfo
backup-pdfs-update-metadata.description: Creates a backup copy of each PDF in a source folder, then uses Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfFileInfo to modify the document's title, author, and subject metadata.

merge-xmp-metadata-with-pdf-file-info.title: Merge XMP Metadata with PDF File Info
merge-xmp-metadata-with-pdf-file-info.description: Demonstrates how to add custom XMP properties to a PDF, then combine them with standard document properties using PdfFileInfo, and finally save the merged metadata to a new PDF.

read-pdf-metadata-handle-empty-values.title: Read PDF Metadata and Handle Empty Values
read-pdf-metadata-handle-empty-values.description: Demonstrates how to retrieve standard and custom PDF metadata using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfFileInfo and gracefully handle null or empty results.

list-pdf-custom-metadata-alphabetically.title: List PDF Custom Metadata Alphabetically
list-pdf-custom-metadata-alphabetically.description: The example reads a PDF file, extracts all custom XMP metadata keys, sorts them alphabetically, and prints each key with its corresponding value.

update-pdf-metadata-from-json.title: Update PDF Metadata from JSON using PdfFileInfo
update-pdf-metadata-from-json.description: Shows how to read metadata definitions from a JSON file and apply them to PDF documents using Aspose.Pdf's PdfFileInfo facade.

thread-safe-pdf-metadata-update.title: Thread‑Safe PDF Metadata Update with PdfFileInfo
thread-safe-pdf-metadata-update.description: Shows how to modify PDF metadata concurrently by creating a separate PdfFileInfo instance per thread and using Parallel.ForEach for safe parallel processing.

validate-set-pdf-metadata-with-regex.title: Validate and Set PDF Metadata with Regex
validate-set-pdf-metadata-with-regex.description: Shows how to validate metadata values using a regular expression before assigning them to a PDF via Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfFileInfo, including both standard and custom properties.

set-pdf-language-property.title: Set PDF Language Property Using PdfFileInfo
set-pdf-language-property.description: Demonstrates how to set the language identifier of a PDF to "en-US" using the PdfFileInfo facade and save the updated document.

set-custom-document-id-metadata.title: Set Custom Document ID Metadata in PDF
set-custom-document-id-metadata.description: Demonstrates how to generate a GUID and store it as a custom metadata entry (DocumentID) in a PDF using the Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfFileInfo facade.

add-department-metadata-to-pdfs.title: Add Custom Department Metadata to PDFs
add-department-metadata-to-pdfs.description: Demonstrates how to loop through PDF files, set a custom metadata field called "Department" using Aspose.Pdf.Facades, and save the updated PDFs to an output folder.

add-lastupdated-timestamp-metadata.title: Add LastUpdated Timestamp Metadata to PDF
add-lastupdated-timestamp-metadata.description: Demonstrates how to add a custom metadata field containing the current UTC timestamp to a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades and save the updated document.

dispose-pdf-objects-using-blocks.title: Dispose PDF Objects Using Using Blocks
dispose-pdf-objects-using-blocks.description: Shows how to properly dispose Aspose.Pdf PdfFileInfo and Document objects with using statements, read page count, add a page, and save the modified PDF.

update-pdf-metadata-using-memorystream.title: Update PDF Metadata Using MemoryStream
update-pdf-metadata-using-memorystream.description: Demonstrates loading a PDF into a MemoryStream, modifying its metadata via PdfFileInfo, and saving the updated document to a new file.

conditionally-update-pdf-author-metadata.title: Conditionally Update PDF Author Metadata
conditionally-update-pdf-author-metadata.description: Shows how to read a PDF's Author metadata with Aspose.Pdf.Facades, set it only when the field is empty, and save the updated information to a new file.

export-pdf-metadata-to-json.title: Export PDF Metadata to JSON
export-pdf-metadata-to-json.description: Shows how to read metadata from PDF files in a directory using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfFileInfo and serialize the collected information into a JSON file.

update-pdf-metadata-in-parallel.title: Update PDF Metadata in Parallel Using Aspose.Pdf
update-pdf-metadata-in-parallel.description: Shows how to modify title, author, subject, and keywords of multiple PDF files concurrently using the PdfFileInfo facade and the Task Parallel Library.

update-pdf-subject-metadata.title: Update PDF Subject Metadata Using PdfFileInfo
update-pdf-subject-metadata.description: Demonstrates how to modify the Subject field of a PDF document's metadata with Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfFileInfo and save the changes to a new file.

convert-pdf-to-pdfa-1b-with-pdffileinfo.title: Convert PDF to PDF/A‑1b and enforce compliance via PdfFileInfo
convert-pdf-to-pdfa-1b-with-pdffileinfo.description: The example loads a PDF, converts it to PDF/A‑1b using Document.Convert, checks the compliance flag, and saves the compliant file with the PdfFileInfo facade while enabling strict validation.
